feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable to Restrict Edit Functionality in Display Maintenance Order App
entry.content: We would like to restrict the Edit functionality in the Display Maintenance Order app. Currently, users can view and also edit maintenance orders, but the requirement is to provide display-only access. During our analysis, we created a test role with only the SAP_EAM_BC_MP_ORD_DSP_PC catalog, which allows users to display orders but not edit them, showing the desired behavior. This indicates that an additional catalog, IAM app, or authorization is granting Edit access. We request help to identify the authorization responsible and guidance on how to restrict editing while keeping display access. I have prepared a Word document with attached screenshots showing what we are currently experiencing and what we desire.

entry.title: Purchase order 4500000012 does not contain items for a stock transfer (M7153)
entry.content: During the PGI process, an error occurred and the PGI could not be completed.

entry.title: Revision level for a material in S4 public cloud
entry.content:
Hi All, Please Suggest.

I’m working on some post migration tasks one of them is mass load of Product Revision Level.

In ECC we used External Revision Levels allowing us to enter any level we wanted.

P1 – P5 was for preproduction product then it would get a number or another alphanumeric code.

In S4 public cloud is there a configuration that will allow us to use any revision level we want…

If I removed all the Revision Levels will that allow us the use anything we want???

Thanks

entry.title: Requirement for BP Type-Based Customer Statement Email Processing
entry.content: Currently, customer statements are sent automatically through Output Parameter Determination and the Schedule Accounts Receivable Jobs application. The customer requirement is to send emails based on the Business Partner Type instead of processing all customers together. Please confirm whether filtering or scheduling based on BP Type is available in the standard SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud functionality, or if this requirement would require a custom enhancement.

entry.title: Supplier DPR creation We are facing error _Account 65001000 does not exist in chart of accounts YCOA
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

While attempting to create a supplier down payment request with a WBS element in the test system, we encountered the following error: "Account 65001000 does not exist in the chart of accounts YCOA."

We did not encounter this error during testing in the custom system. In the custom system, we observed that this GL account (65001000 - Purchase Service) was blocked in the master data, and its implementation status was set to 'In process'—however, these settings were not transferred to the test system.

My question is: What is the relationship between this GL code and the supplier down payment process? We did not configure this setup.

We do not want to use this GL code.

Please let me know if there is any standard SAP configuration related to this.

Thanks & Regards,

DNR

entry.title: Record Time option is not displayed in the Perform Maintenance Jobs app
entry.content: We are facing an issue in the Perform Maintenance Jobs App.A maintenance order has been scheduled, and the maintenance work has been executed successfully. However, when attempting to record the actual time spent on the job, the "Record Time" option is not available on the screen.

entry.title: Alternative Standard Mobile Application for Batch-Managed Outbound Deliveries Without EWM
entry.content:
Hello,

In our customer's system, warehouse operators are expected to perform goods issue processes using handheld barcode scanning devices in production sites where SAP EWM will not be implemented.

We evaluated the Pick Outbound Delivery application for this purpose. However, when an outbound delivery contains batch-managed materials, the application displays the following error message:

LS_SHP022
"Delivery contains items with batches and cannot be maintained."

Therefore, we are unable to recommend this application for our scenario.

We would appreciate your guidance on the following questions:

Is there any configuration, activation, or recommended approach that would allow the Pick Outbound Delivery application to be used with batch-managed materials?
If this is a standard product limitation, which standard SAP application is recommended in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud without EWM for warehouse operators using handheld devices to perform the following activities?

  • Select or scan an outbound delivery
  • Select or confirm the batch
  • Confirm the picked quantity
  • Post Goods Issue (PGI)

entry.title: How to Automatically Assign Default Business Roles to New Users in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and manage users through the Maintain Business Users application.

We have a requirement to automatically assign a set of default business roles whenever a new business user is created. Currently, the role assignment is performed manually, which becomes time-consuming and prone to errors when onboarding a large number of users.

We would like to understand:

  • Is there any standard API available to assign business roles to users in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
  • Is there a way to automate business role assignment during or after user creation?
  • Are there any recommended approaches using SAP Cloud Identity Services, SAP Integration Suite, SAP BTP, or other SAP-supported integration options?
  • Has anyone implemented a similar solution in a Public Cloud environment?

Our objective is to ensure that newly created users automatically receive a predefined set of business roles without requiring manual intervention.

Any guidance, best practices, or references to relevant SAP documentation would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Siva Nagi Reddy

entry.title: Not able to filter out data by Date wise at header level on "Manage Billing Documents" app
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

The Created On field is available in the Line Item Detail section; however, it is not available in the Header Detail section.

Please find the attached screenshot for your reference and let me know if this is expected behavior or if any configuration changes are required.

Regards,

Sudhir Singh

entry.title: How to Prevent Duplicate GST Numbers in Customer and Supplier Master Data in SAP S/4HANA Public Clou
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and have a business requirement related to GST number validation in Business Partner master data.

The business wants to ensure that the GST Number (Tax Number) maintained in a Customer or Supplier master record is unique across the system.

The expected behavior is as follows:

  • When a user creates or updates a Customer or Supplier master record and enters a GST number, the system should automatically check whether the same GST number already exists in any existing Customer or Supplier master record.
  • If the GST number does not exist, the system should allow the record to be saved.
  • If the GST number already exists, the system should prevent the save operation and display an appropriate error message indicating that a duplicate GST number exists.

We are aware of the Configure Matching and Duplicate Check (SSCUI 100274) functionality. However, our requirement is to enforce a hard validation during save, rather than only identifying potential duplicates.

Could you please advise:

  • Is there any standard functionality available in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to enforce uniqueness of GST numbers across Business Partners?
  • Can this requirement be achieved through SSCUI configuration, Business Partner duplicate checks, validation rules, or key user extensibility?
  • Has anyone implemented a similar requirement in a Public Cloud environment?
  • Are there any SAP-recommended best practices for preventing duplicate GST registrations?

Any guidance, documentation references, or implementation experiences would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Siva Nagi Reddy

entry.title: Baseline date and net due date mismatch in the Import Supplier Invoices app (F3041)
entry.content:
Dear SAP supportteam,

We are facing an issue in the Import Supplier Invoices app (F3041). Invoices imported via the template sometimes show a mismatch between the baseline date and the net due date even on working days that are not bank holidays. We understand and use the Japan feature that adjusts due dates when they fall on bank holidays; however, the shifts we observe occur on non-holiday dates.
In the imported invoice’s Payment tab, the field “Days 1 / In Percent” displays the value “1”. We would like to know:

From which logic or source this “1” is derived and populated during import.
Whether this value is tied to the payment terms definition or defaulted by the app.
Whether this value contributes to the mismatch between the baseline date and the net due 
date.


Our expectation is that the net due date equals the baseline date plus the days defined in 
the payment terms, unless a bank-holiday adjustment applies.

Please help identify why the due date is shifted on non-holiday dates in F3041 and clarify the origin and calculation logic of “

entry.title: Clarification on Data Source During OPD Preparation Stage
entry.content:
Hi,

During the printout in forms, when the OPD (Output Determination Parameter) is in the Preparation stage, we have observed that changes made to the material description are reflected in the forms.

I would like to understand:

  • Which data is being fetched from the master during the Preparation stage,
  • The reason for this behavior, and
  • The recommended solution to control or avoid such changes being reflected.

Regards,
Jagadish

entry.title: Unable to Delete Payment Method P for Company Code 1004
entry.content:
Hi Team,

  • Facing issue while configuring Set Up Payment Methods per Company Code for Payment Transactions in public cloud
  • Error message "Deletion not possible for record created by SAP" appears when attempting to delete Payment Method P (Payroll Cheques) for Company Code 1004 in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • All dependent configurations have already been successfully removed
  • Deletion of PM P was successful for all other company codes — the block is specific to CC 1004 only

can u help me know how to delete the payment method from CC 1004

entry.title: OData vs SOAP for .NET WMS Integration in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I am seeking technical advice regarding the integration of a .NET-based WMS solution developed by our team with  SAP Business ByDesign.

As we move away from historical on-premise setups toward a decoupled 'Side-by-Side' architecture, we want to use the app with SAP Public Cloud . I have two critical questions for those who have managed similar cloud transitions:

1. API Utilization for .NET Integration
Since our WMS middleware is built on .NET, we need to ensure robust communication with the SAP core.

  • Which specific OData services or SOAP APIs are recommended for real-time warehouse tasks (e.g., Goods Receipt, Stock Transfer, Picking)in SAP Public Cloud ?
  • For those using SAP Public Cloud, are you primarily using the SiteLogisticsTask or WarehouseConfirmation web services, and how do they perform under the high-frequency request load typical of a .NET scanning application?

2. Public Cloud WM Capability & Responsiveness
We are evaluating how the Warehouse Management (WM) module in the Public Cloud responds to external 'exploits' or calls from a third-party .NET interface.

  • Does the Public Cloud WM module offer the same level of flexibility as the historical on-premise WM/EWM when it comes to API-triggered movements?
  • Are there known performance limitations or 'throttling' issues when a .NET application performs high-volume scanning directly against the Public Cloud tenant?
  • In your experience, does the Public Cloud WM architecture provide sufficient coverage for complex scenarios when managed via external APIs?

We want to ensure that our project respects the 'Clean Core' strategy while maintaining the historical reliability that  our company has built into the  App over the years.

I would greatly appreciate any technical documentation, API maps, or feedback from your own cloud WMS implementations.

Best regards,

entry.title: Configuration for Automatic HU Packing during GR for Production Orders
entry.content:
Hi Team,

For finished products, HU packing during Goods Receipt with respect to the Production Order is expected to happen automatically.

Could you please provide the relevant configuration details in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud that control automatic HU packing for this scenario?

Thanks & Regards,
Kiran

entry.title: CBC Mandatory SD Organizational Units Due to Baseline Accelerator Scope Selection
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are working on an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (3SL) implementation.

During project scoping, the Baseline Accelerator was used, which automatically included several SD-related scope items. However, the customer does not have any SD business processes in scope and does not plan to use SD functionality.

As a result, CBC now requires us to create several SD organizational units (Sales Organization, Distribution Channel, Division, Shipping Points, and related assignments) to complete the Organizational Structure activity.

We attempted to remove the related SD scope items, but CBC no longer allows us to deselect them.

Would there be any functional, technical, or maintenance concerns if we simply create these mandatory organizational units to complete CBC, while leaving them otherwise unused?

Additionally, is there a recommended SAP approach for handling scope items that were automatically selected by the Baseline Accelerator but are not required by the customer?

Thank you in advance for your support.

BR,
Evrim

@Melis_Sorgun 

@MerveBayturk

entry.title: Current vs Non-Current Deferred Revenue Handling in EBRR – Standard Capabilities in PublicCloud 2602
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to classify deferred revenue generated via Event-Based Revenue Recognition (EBRR) into current and non-current portions in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

In this context, we have the following queries:

  1. Reclassification to Separate G/L Accounts
    In S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2602, is there any standard functionality to reclassify EBRR-managed deferred revenue into current and non-current G/L accounts at period end (e.g., via automated postings), without requiring manual journal entries on EBRR-managed accounts?

  2. Standard Reporting for Current vs Non-Current Split
    Is there any standard analytical report that provides a current vs non-current classification of EBRR-generated deferred revenue balances across:

    • Sales Orders
    • Projects
    • Service Documents

As we are not using Contract-Based Revenue Recognition, the standard report “Contract Balance Reclassification” is not applicable in our scenario.

Appreciate your guidance on standard capabilities or recommended approaches in Public Cloud.

entry.title: Triggering SAP_COM_0682 Service
entry.content:
Hello,

We want to trigger "Full Payment - Bulk Send" named outbound SOAP service from SAP_COM_0682 communication scenario.

I configured the communication arrangement, system, user. What we understood from limited informatiom on the API Hub, this service should be triggered automatically when FI-CA payment run happens or payment media file has downloaded. I did both but system didn't trigger the service.

Does somebody know how to trigger this service?

Kind regards,
Berke Günenç

entry.title: Poland: Invoice Number
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

we are operating in Public Cloud and have an issue in Poland.

Invoices (F2), who only contain TAD Material (Service Material) are having a different number range than others.
Service Material invoices start with 183******* and others with 9********.

There is no Custom Logic present and I did not find anything related in SAP Help Portal.

Only configuration I found: Define Number Ranges for Billing Documents

Thanks for your support!

entry.title: Sales Return (Order Type CBAR with Ref of Original Invoice) Workflow In SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Can you please guide step by step process (app which need to configure) to map Sales Return Workflow (Order Type - CBAR with ref. of Original Billing Document) in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Regards,

Ashish
